notes: Master-Reorg SHIP R-3a — PLATFORMS front door (platform-first Hardware+Power collapse; redesign-only, legacy byte-identical, NO content rewrite). Decisions locked by John ('your call'): fold GB200 into a 'GB NVL' card (4 platform cards) · framing-layer content model (no R4 rewrite) · keep GB-series reference (fleet-wide, Design Law 6) · Blast Radius → Deploy deferred to R-3b. (1) Ref/Crash-Cart grid: merged the redundant HARDWARE + POWER cards (both opened #rf-hw = a 'one door per feature' violation) into ONE PLATFORMS card → new rd_openPlatforms(). Grid is now the spec's 7 cards: OPTICS · PLATFORMS · CLI/IB · PARTS · KNOW · COMPASS · GHOST ECHO. (2) Relabeled the 'Hardware' ref-sub stab → 'Platforms' (label-only; panel id rf-hw unchanged). (3) New platform-first LANDING prepended into #rf-hw (redesign_addPlatformsLanding, a new boot fn registered AFTER redesign_homeHardware so #rf-hw is already filled; idempotent, guarded on #rf-platforms; redesign-only early-return): a 'PLATFORMS' label + 4 platform cards — H100 (Hopper/AIR) · H200 (Hopper/AIR) · B200 (Blackwell/AIR) · GB NVL (Blackwell·GB200/GB300 / DLC) — each with a generation line + AIR/DLC cooling badge, + a SHARED card (80% derate NEC 210.20 · 3-phase balance · DLC/CDU · thermal · cage nut). The existing re-homed pg-power function tabs (Power/LED/Rack Map/Blast/Thermal) stay BELOW as the deep content (framing layer). A platform/SHARED tap → rd_platformShowPower() activates the existing pw-power (PDU & Power Math) tab + scrolls to it (no per-platform partition — that needs data + is an R4 rewrite). Search bar untouched (preserved). rd_openPower kept (now unused after the POWER card removal; cleaned up in R-3b/R1). All new code is redesign-gated / pg-ref (redesign chrome, not shown under legacy) → ?legacy=1 byte-identical; inline styles only (CSS braces unchanged). ⚠️ VISUAL IS JOHN'S CALL: the landing UI (card sizing, cooling-badge look, SHARED prominence, whether platforms should route somewhere richer than pw-power) can't be self-verified (deep-view dive is un-automatable) — device-verify is also a design review. Minor: PLATFORMS sits in HARDWARE's old slot (grid position 2), not first; spec lists it first — trivial reorder if wanted. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): Crash Cart grid = 7 cards with PLATFORMS (no separate HARDWARE/POWER); tap PLATFORMS → #rf-hw opens showing the 4 platform cards (correct AIR/DLC badges) + SHARED on top, function tabs below; tap a platform/SHARED → Power (PDU & Power Math) content shows; the 'Platforms' stab + search still reach the same surface; ?legacy=1 identical. ROLLBACK: revert the commit. NEXT: R-3b (remove Blast Radius + Rack Map pills from #rf-hw; add a Blast Radius entry to the Deploy detail — the deferred R-2 step).
